rulings.Case Title: OLEG PAFNUTIEFF VS. ANDREI BOWSUNOWSKI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 5, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFFs OLEG PAFNUTIEFF and ARCHBISHOP KYRILL DMITRIEFF'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer Grant; 1) Motion for Reconsideration - new fact; 2) Demurrer sustained with leave to amend to allege termination of tenancy without claiming termination of life estate. See First Amended Complaint paragraph 15 d and e. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EARL STERN VS. YISRAEL ZAETZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 5, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANTs YISRAEL ZAETZ and ZAETZ HADAS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. 1) Deny Motion to Quash. No evidence submitted re incomplete package; 2) Grant Delta Motion to Quash with leave to amend to allege compliance with CC 827 re mothod and time of service of rent increase. = (501/REQ)
